privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real forensic test data downloaded from the DFTT project (NTFS File Recovery Test Image). Target hashes are generated at runtime via a Python script in setup_task.sh which randomly samples 4 valid files from the disk image and extracts their MD5 hashes, padding with synthetic random hashes if fewer than 4 files are found. All expected case names (Target_Hunting_2024), case numbers (INV-TGT-009), output directories (/home/ga/Reports/Hit_Exports), and report paths are explicitly defined in the task description and strictly verified by the export scripts and verifier.
